hadiths.chapter: 275. Reward of safeguarding the honor of people and controlling one’s anger
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره عَنْ سَعْدِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَیْفٍ عَنْ أَخِیهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ عَاصِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ الثُّمَالِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ یَقُولُ مَنْ کَفَّ نَفْسَهُ عَنْ أَعْرَاضِ النَّاسِ کَفَّ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ عَذَابَ یَوْمِ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ مَنْ کَفَّ غَضَبَهُ عَنِ النَّاسِ أَقَالَهُ اللَّهُ نَفْسَهُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) said, “One who does not dishonors  people,  the  Almighty  Allah  will  not  reveal  His chastisement on the Day of Judgment and one who does not gets  angry  with others, the  Almighty  Allah will  ignore  his sins on the Day of Judgment.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 275, H. 501
reference.chapter: Reward of safeguarding the honor of people and controlling one’s anger
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of safeguarding the honor of people and controlling one’s anger
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٧٥، ح ٥٠١

hadiths.chapter: 275. Reward of safeguarding the honor of people and controlling one’s anger
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الصَّلْتِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ إِسْمَاعِیلَ بْنِ مِهْرَانَ عَنْ سَیْفِ بْنِ عَمِیرَهَ عَمَّنْ سَمِعَ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ یَقُولُ مَنْ کَفَّ غَضَبَهُ سَتَرَ اللَّهُ عَوْرَتَهُ.
hadiths.en: 2.  It is narrated that Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “Allah will hide the faults of one who controls his anger.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 275, H. 502
reference.chapter: Reward of safeguarding the honor of people and controlling one’s anger
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of safeguarding the honor of people and controlling one’s anger
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٧٥، ح ٥٠٢

hadiths.chapter: 276. Reward of a just ruler, truthful trader and an obedient elderly person
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ الْحِمْیَرِیُّ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ مَهْزِیَارَ عَنْ أَخِیهِ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَهْزِیَارَ عَنْ فَضَالَهَ بْنِ أَیُّوبَ عَنْ سُلَیْمَانَ بْنِ دُرُسْتَوَیْهِ عَنْ عَجْلَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: ثَلَاثَهٌ یُدْخِلُهُمُ اللَّهُ الْجَنَّهَ بِغَیْرِ حِسَابٍ إِمَامٌ عَادِلٌ وَ تَاجِرٌ صَدُوقٌ وَ شَیْخٌ أَفْنَی عُمُرَهُ فِی طَاعَهِ اللَّهِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “Allah will make three types of  people  enter  Paradise  without  any  accounting  –  a  just leader, a truthful trader and an elderly person who spent his life  in Allah’s obedience.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 276, H. 503
reference.chapter: Reward of a just ruler, truthful trader and an obedient elderly person
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of a just ruler, truthful trader and an obedient elderly person
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٧٦، ح ٥٠٣

hadiths.chapter: 277. Reward of new good deeds for old sins
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ التَّاجِرِ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَهْزِیَارَ عَمَّنْ رَوَاهُ عَنِ الْحَارِثِ بْنِ الْأَحْوَلِ صَاحِبِ الطَّاقِ عَنْ جَمِیلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ قَالَ قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع لَا یَغُرَّکَ النَّاسُ مِنْ نَفْسِکَ فَإِنَّ الْأَمْرَ یَصِلُ إِلَیْکَ مِنْ دُونِهِمْ لَا تَقْطَعِ النَّهَارَ بِکَذَا وَ کَذَا فَإِنَّ مَعَکَ مَنْ یَحْفَظُ عَلَیْکَ وَ لَمْ أَرَ شَیْئاً قَطُّ أَشَدَّ طَلَباً وَ لَا أَسْرَعَ دَرَکاً مِنَ الْحَسَنَهِ لِلذَّنْبِ الْقَدِیمِ وَ لَا تُصَغِّرْ شَیْئاً مِنَ الْخَیْرِ فَإِنَّکَ تَرَاهُ غَداً حَیْثُ یَسُرُّکَ وَ لَا تُصَغِّرْ شَیْئاً مِنَ الشَّرِّ فَإِنَّکَ تَرَاهُ غَداً حَیْثُ یَسُوؤُکَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ یَقُولُ إِنَّ الْحَسَناتِ یُذْهِبْنَ السَّیِّئاتِ ذلِکَ ذِکْری لِلذَّاکِرِینَ
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) said, “Do not deceive yourself for you will see the punishment and reward of your deeds. Do not waste your day for angels present along with you note down your deeds. I didn’t see an effect sooner than an effect of a new good deed on old sins. Do not consider a good deed small because you will see tomorrow that it will grant you  happiness.  Do  not  consider  any  bad  deed  small because you will see tomorrow that it will cause you pain. The Almighty Allah has said, ‘Surely good deeds wipe out sins and this is to be remembered’.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 277, H. 504
reference.chapter: Reward of new good deeds for old sins
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of new good deeds for old sins
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٧٧، ح ٥٠٤

hadiths.chapter: 278. Reward of memorizing forty traditions
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی أَحْمَدُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُوسَی بْنُ إِبْرَاهِیمَ الْمَرْوَزِیُّ عَنْ أَبِی الْحَسَنِ الْأَوَّلِ ع قَالَ قَالَ النَّبِیُّ ص مَنْ حَفِظَ مِنْ أُمَّتِی أَرْبَعِینَ حَدِیثاً مِمَّا یَحْتَاجُونَ إِلَیْهِ مِنْ أَمْرِ دِینِهِمْ بَعَثَهُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ فَقِیهاً عَالِماً.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam Musa Kadhim (a.s.) narrates that the Messenger of Allah  (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “Allah  will  resurrect  on  the  Day  of Judgment as a jurist and a scholar one who memorizes forty traditions as a part of a commandment of his religion.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 278, H. 505
reference.chapter: Reward of memorizing forty traditions
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of memorizing forty traditions
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٧٨، ح ٥٠٥

hadiths.chapter: 279. Reward of avoiding a sin
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ یَحْیَی عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ إِسْحَاقَ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ مَهْزِیَارَ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَبِی الْمُغِیرَهِ عَنْ طَلْحَهَ بْنِ زَیْدٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَرَّ عِیسَی ابْنُ مَرْیَمَ ع عَلَی قَوْمٍ یَبْکُونَ فَقَالَ مَا یُبْکِی هَؤُلَاءِ فَقِیلَ یَبْکُونَ عَلَی ذُنُوبِهِمْ قَالَ فَلْیَدَعُوهَا یُغْفَرْ لَهُمْ.
hadiths.en: 1. Abi (rah) from Muhammad b. Yahya from al-Hussain b. Ishaq from Ali b. Mahziyar from al-Hussain b. Sa’eed from Muhammad b. Khalid from Abi al-Mughira from Talha b. Zayd from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Isa bin Maryam (a.s.) passed by a community. He asked them, ‘Why are you people crying?’ They replied, ‘We are crying over our sins’. He remarked, ‘If they give up these sins they would be forgiven’.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 279, H. 506
reference.chapter: Reward of avoiding a sin
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of avoiding a sin
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٧٩، ح ٥٠٦

hadiths.chapter: 280. Reward of making a believer happy
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ الْهَیْثَمِ بْنِ أَبِی مَسْرُوقٍ النَّهْدِیِّ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنِ ابْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ رَجُلٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَوْحَی اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِلَی دَاوُدَ ع أَنَّ الْعَبْدَ مِنْ عِبَادِی لَیَأْتِینِی بِالْحَسَنَهِ فَأُبِیحُهُ جَنَّتِی قَالَ فَقَالَ دَاوُدُ ع یَا رَبِّ وَ مَا تِلْکَ الْحَسَنَهُ قَالَ یُدْخِلُ عَلَی عَبْدِیَ الْمُؤْمِنِ سُرُوراً وَ لَوْ بِتَمْرَهٍ فَقَالَ دَاوُدُ ع یَا رَبِّ حَقٌّ لِمَنْ عَرَفَکَ أَنْ لَا یَقْطَعَ رَجَاءَهُ مِنْکَ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from al-Haytham b. Abi Masruq al-Hindi from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Ibn Sinan from a man from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “O Lord, one who has recognized You is deserving that he does not cut off his hopes from You.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 280, H. 507
reference.chapter: Reward of making a believer happy
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of making a believer happy
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٠، ح ٥٠٧

hadiths.chapter: 281. Reward of piety, abstinence and paying attention towards Allah in prayers
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ الْکَرْخِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ سَمِعْتُهُ یَقُولُ لَا یَجْمَعُ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ المؤمن [لِلْمُؤْمِنِ] الْوَرَعَ وَ الزُّهْدَ وَ الْإِقْبَالَ إِلَی اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِی الصَّلَاهِ فِی الدُّنْیَا إِلَّا رَجَوْتُ لَهُ الْجَنَّهَ ثُمَّ قَالَ وَ إِنِّی لَأُحِبُّ الرَّجُلَ مِنْکُمُ الْمُؤْمِنَ إِذَا قَامَ فِی صَلَاهٍ فَرِیضَهٍ أَنْ یُقْبِلَ بِقَلْبِهِ إِلَی اللَّهِ وَ لَا یَشْغَلَ قَلْبَهُ بِأَمْرِ الدُّنْیَا فَلَیْسَ مِنْ مُؤْمِنٍ یُقْبِلُ بِقَلْبِهِ فِی صَلَاتِهِ إِلَی اللَّهِ إِلَّا أَقْبَلَ اللَّهُ إِلَیْهِ بِوَجْهِهِ وَ أَقْبَلَ بِقُلُوبِ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ إِلَیْهِ بِالْمَحَبَّهِ لَهُ بَعْدَ حُبِّ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ إِیَّاهُ.
hadiths.en: 1.  It  is  narrated  that  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  said,  “If  the Almighty Allah grants a person piety and abstinence I hope for Paradise for him. I love it very much that a believer pays attention towards Allah in his obligatory prayers and does not  worry  about  the  world.  If  a  believer  pays  attention towards Allah He too turns towards him and develop His love  in  the  hearts  of  believers  and  will  Himself  love  that believer.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 281, H. 508
reference.chapter: Reward of piety, abstinence and paying attention towards Allah in prayers
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of piety, abstinence and paying attention towards Allah in prayers
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨١، ح ٥٠٨

hadiths.chapter: 282. Reward of solving problems, being delicate in calamities and hiding the faults of a believer
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ یَحْیَی عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ جَمِیلِ بْنِ صَالِحٍ عَنْ ذَرِیحٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَیُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ نَفَّسَ عَنْ مُؤْمِنٍ کُرْبَهً نَفَّسَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ سَبْعِینَ کُرْبَهً مِنْ کُرَبِ الدُّنْیَا وَ کُرَبِ یَوْمِ الْقِیَامَهِ وَ قَالَ مَنْ یَسَّرَ عَلَی مُؤْمِنٍ وَ هُوَ مُعْسِرٌ یَسَّرَ اللَّهُ لَهُ حَوَائِجَهُ فِی الدُّنْیَا وَ الْآخِرَهِ وَ قَالَ مَنْ سَتَرَ عَلَی مُؤْمِنٍ عَوْرَهً یَخَافُهَا سَتَرَ اللَّهُ عَلَیْهِ سَبْعِینَ عَوْرَهً مِنْ عَوْرَاتِهِ الَّتِی یَخَافُهَا فِی الدُّنْیَا وَ الْآخِرَهِ قَالَ وَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ فِی عَوْنِ الْمُؤْمِنِ مَا کَانَ الْمُؤْمِنُ فِی عَوْنِ أَخِیهِ الْمُؤْمِنِ فَانْتَفِعُوا بِالْعِظَهِ وَ ارْغَبُوا فِی الْخَیْرِ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Yahya from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Jameel b. Salih from Dharih from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “If a believer solves the problems of another believer the Almighty Allah will solve seventy problems of the world and hereafter for him. Allah will resurrect him on the Day of Judgment as a jurist and a scholar. If he handles a poor believer delicately the Almighty Allah will handle that person delicately as regards his wishes in the world and the hereafter. One who hides a fault of a believer the Almighty Allah will hide seventy faults of that person. One who helps a believing brother the Almighty Allah helps that person. Benefit from these advices and move towards goodness.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 282, H. 509
reference.chapter: Reward of solving problems, being delicate in calamities and hiding the faults of a believer
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of solving problems, being delicate in calamities and hiding the faults of a believer
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٢، ح ٥٠٩

hadiths.chapter: 283. Reward of offering food, water and clothes to a believer
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ مُوسَی بْنِ الْمُتَوَکِّلِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَلِیُّ بْنُ الْحُسَیْنِ السَّعْدَآبَادِیُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ مَحْبُوبٍ عَنْ هِشَامِ بْنِ سَالِمٍ عَنْ أَبِی بَصِیرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: أَیُّمَا مُؤْمِنٍ أَطْعَمَ مُؤْمِناً لَیْلَهً مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ کَتَبَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِذَلِکَ مِثْلَ أَجْرِ مَنْ أَعْتَقَ ثَلَاثِینَ رَقَبَهً نَسَمَهً مُؤْمِنَهً وَ کَانَ لَهُ بِذَلِکَ عِنْدَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ دَعْوَهٌ مُسْتَجَابَهٌ.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Musa b. al-Mutawakil who said it was narrated to me by Ali b. al-Hussain al-Sa’dabadi from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from al-Hassan b. Mahbub from Hisham b. Salim from Abi Basir from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who offers food to a believing brother in any night of the month of Ramadan the Almighty Allah will grant the reward of freeing thirty believing slaves and his supplications will be accepted because of this deed.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 283, H. 510
reference.chapter: Reward of offering food, water and clothes to a believer
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of offering food, water and clothes to a believer
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٣، ح ٥١٠

hadiths.chapter: 283. Reward of offering food, water and clothes to a believer
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ إِبْرَاهِیمَ عَنْ عُمَرَ عَنْ أَبِی حَمْزَهَ الثُّمَالِیِّ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ الْحُسَیْنِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَطْعَمَ مُؤْمِناً مِنْ جُوعٍ أَطْعَمَهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ ثِمَارِ الْجَنَّهِ وَ مَنْ سَقَی مُؤْمِناً مِنْ ظَمَإٍ سَقَاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ الرَّحِیقِ الْمَخْتُومِ وَ مَنْ کَسَا مُؤْمِناً کَسَاهُ اللَّهُ مِنَ الثِّیَابِ الْخُضْرِ.
hadiths.en: 2. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Hamad b. Ibrahim from Umar from Abi Hamzah al-Thumali from Ali b. al-Hussain (a.s.) who said: “One who offers food to a hungry believer, the Almighty Allah will give him fruits of Paradise to eat. One who offers water to a thirsty believer the Almighty Allah will satisfy him with the drinks of Paradise. One who offers clothes to a believer the Almighty Allah will dress him in Green Dress.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 283, H. 511
reference.chapter: Reward of offering food, water and clothes to a believer
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of offering food, water and clothes to a believer
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٣، ح ٥١١

hadiths.chapter: 284. Reward of offering food to a believer in the way of Allah
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ رِبْعِیٍّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَطْعَمَ أَخاً فِی اللَّهِ کَانَ لَهُ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ مِثْلُ مَنْ أَطْعَمَ فِئَاماً مِنَ النَّاسِ قُلْتُ وَ مَا الْفِئَامُ قَالَ مِائَهُ أَلْفٍ مِنَ النَّاسِ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Hamad b. Rib’i from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who feeds a believer for the sake of Allah will get the reward of feeding Fiyaam people.” The narrator asked, “What is meant by Fiyaam?” Imam (a.s.) replied, “A hundred thousand people.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 284, H. 512
reference.chapter: Reward of offering food to a believer in the way of Allah
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of offering food to a believer in the way of Allah
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٤، ح ٥١٢

hadiths.chapter: 285. Reward of feeding three believers
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْغِفَارِیِّ عَنْ عَلِیِّ بْنِ أَبِی الهنی [عَلِیٍّ اللَّهَبِیِ] عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ: مَنْ أَطْعَمَ ثَلَاثَهَ نَفَرٍ مِنَ الْمُؤْمِنِینَ أَطْعَمَهُ اللَّهُ مِنْ ثَلَاثِ جِنَانٍ مَلَکُوتِ السَّمَاءِ الْفِرْدَوْسِ وَ جَنَّهِ عَدْنٍ وَ طُوبَی وَ هِیَ شَجَرَهٌ مِنْ جَنَّهِ عَدْنٍ غَرَسَهَا رَبِّی بِیَدِهِ.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah b. Muhammad al-Ghifari from Ali b. Abi al-Hana [Ali al-Lahabi] from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said who said: “One who feeds three believers the Almighty Allah will offer him food in the three Gardens – Jannat-e-Firdaus, Jannat-e-Adn and Jannat-e- Tooba. Tooba is a tree of Jannat-e-Adn, grown by the Lord Himself.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 285, H. 513
reference.chapter: Reward of feeding three believers
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of feeding three believers
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٥، ح ٥١٣

hadiths.chapter: 286. Reward of feeding a believer to satiation
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عُبَیْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ مَیْمُونٍ الْقَدَّاحِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَطْعَمَ مُسْلِماً حَتَّی یُشْبِعَهُ لَمْ یَدْرِ أَحَدٌ مِنْ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ مَا لَهُ مِنَ الْأَجْرِ فِی الْآخِرَهِ لَا مَلَکٌ مُقَرَّبٌ وَ لَا نَبِیٌّ مُرْسَلٌ إِلَّا رَبُّ الْعَالَمِینَ- ثُمَّ قَالَ مِنْ مُوجِبَاتِ الْمَغْفِرَهِ إِطْعَامُ الْمُسْلِمِ السَّغْبَانِ ثُمَّ تَلَا قَوْلَ اللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ- أَوْ إِطْعامٌ فِی یَوْمٍ ذِی مَسْغَبَهٍ. یَتِیماً ذا مَقْرَبَهٍ أَوْ مِسْکِیناً ذا مَتْرَبَهٍ
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Ja’far b. Muhammad from ’Ubayd-Allah from Abdillah b. Maymun al-Qadah from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “Nothing in this universe except Allah, knows the reward of feeding a Muslim to satiation. Feeding a Muslim is one of the deeds of being forgiven of one’s sins.” Imam recited the verse: ‘…Or the giving of food in a day of hunger to an orphan, having relationship, or to the poor man lying in the dust.”13

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 286, H. 514
reference.chapter: Reward of feeding a believer to satiation
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of feeding a believer to satiation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٦، ح ٥١٤

hadiths.chapter: 287. Reward of feeding four Muslims to satiation
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَبْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَحْمَدَ عَنْ أَبَانِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ فُضَیْلِ بْنِ یَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَشْبَعَ أَرْبَعَهً مِنَ الْمُسْلِمِینَ تَعْدِلُ مُحَرَّرَهً مِنْ وُلْدِ إِسْمَاعِیلَ ع.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Abdillah b. Ja’far from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Muhammad b. Ahmad from Aban b. Uthman from Fudhayl b. Yasar from Abi Ja’far (a.s.) who said: “One who satisfies the hunger of four Muslims, Allah will grant him the reward of freeing a slave from the progeny of Ismail (a.s.).”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 287, H. 515
reference.chapter: Reward of feeding four Muslims to satiation
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of feeding four Muslims to satiation
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٧، ح ٥١٥

hadiths.chapter: 288. Reward of feeding a hungry Believer
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِیٍّ مَاجِیلَوَیْهِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی عَمِّی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ أَبِی الْقَاسِمِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ جَعْفَرِ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ الصَّادِقِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَشْبَعَ جَوْعَهَ مُؤْمِنٍ وَضَعَ اللَّهُ لَهُ مَائِدَهً فِی الْجَنَّهِ یَصْدُرُ عَنْهَا الثَّقَلَانِ جَمِیعاً.
hadiths.en: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. Ali Majluwayh who said it was narrated to me by my uncle Muhammad b. Abi al-Qasim from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from Abi Abdillah Ja’far b. Muhammad al-Sadiq (a.s.) who said: “One who feeds a believer to satiation, Allah will lay such a table in Paradise that all the Jinn and men could have their fill from it.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 288, H. 516
reference.chapter: Reward of feeding a hungry Believer
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of feeding a hungry Believer
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٨، ح ٥١٦

hadiths.chapter: 289. Reward of freeing a Muslim slave
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عِیسَی عَنْ رِبْعِیٍّ عَنْ سَمَاعَهَ عَنْ أَبِی جَعْفَرٍ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ أَعْتَقَ مُسْلِماً أَعْتَقَ اللَّهُ لَهُ بِکُلِّ عُضْوٍ مِنْهُ عُضْواً مِنَ النَّارِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam  Muhammad  Baqir  (a.s.)  narrates  that  the  Holy Prophet (s.a.w.s.) said, “One who frees a Muslim slave for the sake of Allah for each part of the body of that slave, the Almighty Allah will keep a part of his body safe from the fire of Hell.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 289, H. 517
reference.chapter: Reward of freeing a Muslim slave
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of freeing a Muslim slave
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٨٩، ح ٥١٧

hadiths.chapter: 290. Reward of freeing a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ سِنَانٍ عَنْ بَشِیرٍ النَّبَّالِ قَالَ سَمِعْتُ جَعْفَرَ بْنَ مُحَمَّدٍ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَعْتَقَ نَسَمَهً صَالِحَهً لِوَجْهِ اللَّهِ کَفَّرَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ مَکَانَ کُلِّ عُضْوٍ مِنْهُ عُضْواً مِنَ النَّارِ.
hadiths.en: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Abi Abdillah from his father from Muhammad b. Sinan from Basheer al-Nabbal who said I heard Ja’far b. Muhammad (a.s.) who said: “One who frees a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah for each part of the body of that slave, the Almighty Allah will keep a part of his body safe from the fire of Hell.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 290, H. 518
reference.chapter: Reward of freeing a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of freeing a virtuous slave for the sake of Allah
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٩٠، ح ٥١٨

hadiths.chapter: 291. Reward of freeing a believing slave
hadiths.ar: أَبِی ره قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ أَبِی الْبِلَادِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ رَفَعَهُ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ أَعْتَقَ مُؤْمِناً أَعْتَقَ اللَّهُ بِکُلِّ عُضْوٍ مِنْهُ عُضْواً مِنَ النَّارِ وَ إِنْ کَانَتْ أُنْثَی أَعْتَقَ اللَّهُ بِکُلِّ عُضْوَیْنِ مِنْهَا عُضْواً مِنْهُ مِنَ النَّارِ لِأَنَّ الْمَرْأَهَ نِصْفٌ مِنَ الرَّجُلِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  The  Holy  Prophet  (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “One  who  frees  a believing  slave  for  the  sake  of Allah,  for  each part of the body of that slave, the Almighty Allah will keep the parts of his body safe from the fire of Hell. If that slave is a woman for every two parts of the body of that woman, the Almighty Allah will keep a part of his body safe from the fire of Hell. Surely a woman is half that of a man.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 291, H. 519
reference.chapter: Reward of freeing a believing slave
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of freeing a believing slave
reference.ar_citation: ثواب الأعمال وعقاب الأعمال، باب ٢٩١، ح ٥١٩

hadiths.chapter: 292. Reward of giving a loan to a believer
hadiths.ar: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَبِیهِ وَ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ النَّضْرِ عَنْ عَمْرِو بْنِ شِمْرٍ عَنْ جَابِرٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ص مَنْ أَقْرَضَ مُؤْمِناً قَرْضاً یَنْتَظِرُ بِهِ مَیْسُورَهُ کَانَ مَالُهُ فِی زَکَاهٍ وَ کَانَ هُوَ فِی صَلَاهٍ مِنَ الْمَلَائِکَهِ حَتَّی یُؤَدِّیَهُ إِلَیْهِ.
hadiths.en: 1.  Imam  Ja’far  Sadiq  (a.s.)  narrates  that  the  Holy  Prophet (s.a.w.s.)  said,  “One  who  grants  a  loan  to  a  believer  and remains silent till it is repaid, his wealth will remain pure and angels will send salutations on him till that time.”

reference.citation: Thawāb al-Aʿmāl wa ʿiqāb al-Aʿmāl, Ch. 292, H. 520
reference.chapter: Reward of giving a loan to a believer
reference.location: Rewards › Reward of giving a loan to a believer
